steps.title: Multiply both sides by 25
steps.content:
To isolate $x^2$, multiply both sides by 25:
$$\frac{x^2}{25} \cdot 25 = 36 \cdot 25$$
$$x^2 = 900$$

steps.title: Take the positive square root
steps.content:
Since $x^2 = 900$, and the answer choices are all positive, take the positive square root:
$$x = \sqrt{900} = 30$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
